description_long: This is a tall, freestanding floor-mounted faucet with a sleek, cylindrical body and a high gooseneck spout. The faucet features a single lever handle for water control, positioned on the side of the main column. Attached to the side is a slim, vertical hand shower with a flexible hose, allowing for versatile use. The finish is a dark, metallic tone, likely oil-rubbed bronze or black, giving it a modern and elegant appearance. The base is circular and sturdy, designed to provide stability when installed on the floor. This type of fixture is commonly found in upscale urban environments, such as public parks, outdoor plazas, or luxury residential settings.
description: A tall, floor-mounted faucet with a gooseneck spout, single lever handle, and attached hand shower in a dark metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gooseneck spout, single lever handle, and the attached hand shower with hose.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved spout and cylindrical body, with the handle and hand shower less visible.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the spout, handle, and hand shower from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the gooseneck spout and cylindrical column, with the handle and hand shower not visible.
